description:
Expand printing support into a full queue with statuses like queued, printing, completed, and failed. Add retry controls, printer routing, and alerts when jobs stall or fail.

**Rationale:** Print fulfillment is a critical operational step for many photo booth businesses. Queue visibility and retries prevent lost orders and onsite confusion.
title: Print Order Management Queue
